title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi's team at University of Cambridge uses AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to analyze bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The AI-assisted workflow compresses analysis time from years to minutes, accelerating antimicrobial resistance research.
